mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, role, status, rag_tokens_input, rag_tokens_output, ppt_tokens_input, ppt_tokens_output, rag_doc_count, rag_slice_count, ppt_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET ${field} = ${field} + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET rag_tokens_input = rag_tokens_input + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET rag_tokens_output = rag_tokens_output + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET ppt_tokens_input = ppt_tokens_input + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET ppt_tokens_output = ppt_tokens_output + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET rag_doc_count = rag_doc_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET rag_slice_count = rag_slice_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET ppt_count = ppt_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE user SET rag_tokens_input = #{ragTokensInput}, rag_tokens_output = #{ragTokensOutput}, ppt_tokens_input = #{pptTokensInput}, ppt_tokens_output = #{pptTokensOutput}, rag_doc_count = #{ragDocCount}, rag_slice_count = #{ragSliceCount}, ppt_count = #{pptCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET rag_tokens_input = 0, rag_tokens_output = 0, ppt_tokens_input = 0, ppt_tokens_output = 0, rag_doc_count = 0, rag_slice_count = 0, ppt_count = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, role, email, status FROM user WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, role, email, phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM user ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
